- [ ] Make sure your issue is not a duplicate of an existing [issue](https://github.com/Valcyle/Rune-Launcher/issues).

## 🛑 Describe the Bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 🛠 To Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Execute command '...'
3. See error

## 🎯 Expected Behavior
A clear description of what you expected to happen.

## 💻 Environment Information
- **Rune Launcher Version:** (e.g., v1.0.0-beta.1)
- **Minecraft Version:** (e.g., 1.21.4)
- **OS:** (e.g., Windows 11)

## 📋 Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here (e.g., stack traces, logs, or screenshots).
